creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #40)

Wait! LLVM from ports does not install the headers. It uses /usr/include/c++/v1/__utility/pair.h for #include <pair>. Please, patch the base (you can install the world to a jail then). Then it will work.

As you can see, my patch cannot be applied only to a port :(
